basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT), Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: MANIT Bhopal is inviting applications for a short-term research position in the field of Rural Microgrid under a prestigious CPRI-funded project. This is an excellent opportunity for engineering graduates with interest in power systems and renewable energy.

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: B.Tech / BE / ME / M.Tech in relevant stream (Electrical Engineering / Power Systems / Renewable Energy etc.) | Desirable: | GATE qualification Industry experience Knowledge of Microgrid planning Hands-on experience in modelling & simulation using MATLAB/ETAP Knowledge of IoT, PLC

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring duly filled application form
how_to_apply: Mode 1 (Preferred): Walk-in Interview on 22 July 2026 at 11:00 AM with all documents. Mode 2: Email the completed application form along with supporting documents to [email protected]
Application Form: Available in the official advertisement.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Continuation depends on satisfactory research performance. Selected candidates cannot claim regular appointment in the institute. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

content_sections.text: Download MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: MANIT Bhopal is inviting applications for a short-term research position in the field of Rural Microgrid under a prestigious CPRI-funded project. This is an excellent opportunity for engineering graduates with interest in power systems and renewable energy.

rows.maulana_azad_national_institute_of_techn: Design and Development of Sustainable Framework and Control Strategies for Rural Microgrid

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: B.Tech / BE / ME / M.Tech in relevant stream (Electrical Engineering / Power Systems / Renewable Energy etc.) Desirable: GATE qualification Industry experience Knowledge of Microgrid planning Hands-on experience in modelling & simulation using MATLAB/ETAP Knowledge of IoT, PLC

content_sections.heading: Fellowship Details
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month (Consolidated) for the duration of 3 months.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring duly filled application form, detailed CV, original documents, self-attested photocopies, and two passport size photographs.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Mode 1 (Preferred): Walk-in Interview on 22 July 2026 at 11:00 AM with all documents. Mode 2: Email the completed application form along with supporting documents to [email protected]

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Continuation depends on satisfactory research performance. Selected candidates cannot claim regular appointment in the institute. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for MANIT Bhopal JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled on 22 July 2026 at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How much fellowship is offered for JRF at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q3. What is the project title for MANIT Bhopal JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: “Design and Development of Sustainable Framework and Control Strategies for Rural Microgrid”.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: B.Tech/ME/M.Tech in relevant stream. GATE qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. Is GATE mandatory for MANIT Bhopal JRF 2026?
faq.answer: GATE qualification is desirable but not mandatory.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for MANIT Bhopal JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: Attend walk-in interview or email application to [email protected]

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the JRF project at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The project duration is 03 months.

faq.question: Q8. What skills are desirable for MANIT Bhopal Electrical Engineering JRF?
faq.answer: MATLAB/ETAP, IoT, PLC, Microgrid modelling and simulation.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: No, TA/DA will not be paid.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for MANIT Bhopal JRF walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Application form, CV, educational certificates, experience proofs, and passport size photos.
